---
title: "‘The Treasures of the Snow: Feast of the Purification’"
---

## ‘The Treasures of the Snow: Feast of the Purification’
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (February 1891)

### Notes

This poem signed ‘W.’ may have been written by [[person:1519]Emma Wilford].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
